## Checklist

- [ ] JSON is valid (tested by importing into PromptBar)
- [ ] Each prompt has all required fields: `title`, `tag`, `group`, `desc`, `prompt`
- [ ] `group` matches an existing persona, or I've explained why a new one is needed
- [ ] `prompt` ends with `[INPUT]   ` (3 spaces after the colon)
- [ ] `desc` is one sentence and under 100 characters
- [ ] No duplicate titles with existing prompts
